items.title: Tehran launches more strikes after explosions reported in southern Iran
items.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

items.title: Big fall in oil, gas and cargo ships taking US-backed Hormuz route after new strikes
items.summary: Data shows a decline in the number of ships - many carrying oil and gas - going through the waterway after attacks this week.

items.title: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
items.summary: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 蛤？他拿刀切掉自己GG 「斷根」淋汽油點火燒鄰居車庫
items.summary: 美國印第安納州韋恩堡（Fort Wayne）發生一起讓人不禁眉頭深鎖的縱火案件，一名男子「自宮」後將「斷根」拿來當「火種」，燒了鄰居家的車庫。  綜合外媒報導，案發於5月6日...…

items.title: 烏克蘭利維夫爆反徵兵衝突  檢方啟動刑事調查
